Scott Mills sacked from BBC Radio 2 over 'personal conduct'He's not hosted his show since Tuesday and the BBC has not yet given any more details about the allegations. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckge1yn50y8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/ckge1yn50y8o#0 Mon, 30 Mar 2026 12:22:57 GMT
Car finance compensation details to be revealed with average payout of £700 expectedThe City regulator will outline how millions of people can claim compensation for mis-sold car finance. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9vlm2ggrwlo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9vlm2ggrwlo#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 23:04:10 GMT
'I dread the phone ringing': Inside the kennels responding to vicious XL bully attacksStaff tell Panorama the aggression levels of the dangerous dogs they help to seize are rising. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cewzw812dd1o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cewzw812dd1o#0 Mon, 30 Mar 2026 05:00:09 GMT
Travelodge investigating more reports of strangers accessing rooms, says CEOJo Boydell says the hotel is carrying out a review after guests reported people entering their rooms. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78lj51nxn6o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c78lj51nxn6o#0 Mon, 30 Mar 2026 12:02:37 GMT
Why is Nasa going back to the Moon?From a race with China to lunar discoveries, the US is investing time, effort and money to head to the Moon - and beyond. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd6wp6xenv0o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd6wp6xenv0o#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 23:50:21 GMT
Australian fugitive shot dead by police after seven months on the runDezi Freeman allegedly shot dead two police officers in the small Victorian town of Porepunkah in August. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c93e4gxn22wo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c93e4gxn22wo#0 Mon, 30 Mar 2026 07:07:15 GMT
Cardiff City damages claim over Emiliano Sala death dismissedThe club, which was claiming £104m in compensation, will now have to fork out about £400,000. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8jkeprrn00o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8jkeprrn00o#0 Mon, 30 Mar 2026 13:15:10 GMT
Russia expels British diplomat over spying allegationsA UK Foreign Office spokesman accused Russia of an "aggressive and co-ordinated campaign of harassment against British diplomats". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czx94e7j5jpo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/czx94e7j5jpo#0 Mon, 30 Mar 2026 10:33:56 GMT
Two hurt in Derby car incident released from hospitalPolice have been given more time to question a man arrested on suspicion of attempted murder. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0le0nrnxpno?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0le0nrnxpno#0 Mon, 30 Mar 2026 11:51:29 GMT
Government must do more to help detained Brits in UAE, advocacy group saysThe UK Foreign Office says it is giving consular assistance to "a small number of British nationals" that have been detained there after allegedly taking pictures of Iranian attacks. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cevkd2jzpxyo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cevkd2jzpxyo#0 Mon, 30 Mar 2026 12:47:17 GMT
Thieves steal Renoir, Cézanne and Matisse paintings in three-minute Italian heistThe paintings were taken from a museum in Parma by four masked men in the middle of the night, police say. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn4vw2xmpzzo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn4vw2xmpzzo#0 Sun, 29 Mar 2026 21:29:56 GMT
